columns.name: AVDNR
columns.description: The division number associated with the order

columns.name: FKNR
columns.description: The contract number associated with the order line

columns.name: PARTINR
columns.description: The part number associated with the order line

columns.name: LEVERES_NAA
columns.description: The delivery date for the order line

columns.name: LINJESTATUS
columns.description: The status of the order line

columns.name: ENHETSVEKT
columns.description: The unit weight for the part number

columns.name: TIDSPUNKT
columns.description: The timestamp of the order or line update

columns.name: BRUKERID
columns.description: The user ID associated with the order or line change

columns.name: HISTORIKK
columns.description: A flag indicating if the record is historical data
